category_sources: Official Apache Traffic Server homepage describes it as a fast, scalable, extensible HTTP caching proxy server.
source_facts.description says HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 compliant caching proxy server.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs use Apache Traffic Server.
source_facts.homepage is trafficserver.apache.org, the Apache Traffic Server project site.
docs_sources: Official Apache Traffic Server homepage links Documentation.
Official docs domain hosts the Apache Traffic Server Manual with administrator and developer guides.
repo_sources: Official Apache Traffic Server homepage links Source Code and GitHub repository apache/trafficserver is the official project repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes caching, proxying, CDN-scale use, and HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 compliance.
source_facts.description identifies HTTP caching proxy server.
